sharc
Documentation développeur
LawNNInferenceTesterService.cc
1 // -*- C++ -*-
2 /* Author : gaynor
3  *
4  * Unitary test for Neural Network Law Evaluation using ONNX Model
5  *
6  * This test consist in:
7  * - compute law throw a neural network at onnx format
8  * - Check inferred this neural network according the way that it created
9  * cf _compute_onnx_expected_results, analytical formula to compute weight and biais
10  */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 
14 #include "Main/Tests/ServiceTesters/IServiceTester.h"
15 
16 #include "NNInferenceScalar_law.h"
17 #include "NNInferenceMultiScalar_law.h"
18 
19 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableManager.h"
20 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/FunctionManager.h"
21 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/FunctionEvaluator.h"
22 
23 #include <arcane/random/Uniform01.h>
24 #include <arcane/random/LinearCongruential.h>
25 
26 struct NNSignatureTypes
27 {
28  enum eSignatureType
29  {
30  OnlyScalar,
31  OnlyMultiScalar,
32  Mixed
33  };
34 };
35 
36 #include "LawNNInferenceTester_axl.h"
37 
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
41 class LawNNInferenceTesterService
42  : public ArcaneLawNNInferenceTesterObject
43 {
44 private:
45 
46  // this formula match the neural network was created
47 
48  static float weight(const int couche, const int in_out, const int hidden_neural){
49  return float((couche + 1)*(hidden_neural + 1))/(10 + in_out);
50  }
51 
52  static float biais(const int couche, const int hidden_neural){
53  return float((couche + 1))/(10 + hidden_neural);
54  }
55 
56  // test_model_3_2_2.onnx
57  // 3 inputs, 1 hidden layer of 2 neurons , 2 outputs
58  static void _compute_onnx_expected_results(
59  const float in1,
60  const float in2,
61  const float in3,
62  float& out1,
63  float& out2
64  )
65  {
66  float neurone_cache_0 = weight(0,0,0) * in1 + weight(0,1,0) * in2 + weight(0,2,0) * in3 + biais(0,0);
67  neurone_cache_0 = neurone_cache_0>0 ? neurone_cache_0:0; // fonction d'activation ReLu
68  float neurone_cache_1 = weight(0,0,1) * in1 + weight(0,1,1) * in2 + weight(0,2,1) * in3 + biais(0,1);
69  neurone_cache_1 = neurone_cache_1>0 ? neurone_cache_1:0; // fonction d'activation ReLu
70  out1 = weight(1,0,0) * neurone_cache_0 + weight(1,1,0) * neurone_cache_1 + biais(1,0);
71  out2 = weight(1,0,1) * neurone_cache_0 + weight(1,1,1) * neurone_cache_1 + biais(1,1);
72  }
73 
74 public:
75 
76  LawNNInferenceTesterService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
77  : ArcaneLawNNInferenceTesterObject(sbi) {}
78 
79  ~LawNNInferenceTesterService() {}
80 
81 private:
82 
83  bool _unitaryTestNNInference();
84 
85 public:
86 
87  void init();
88 
89  Arcane::Integer test()
90  {
91  if(_unitaryTestNNInference()) return 0;
92  return 1;
93  }
94 
95 };
96 
97 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
98 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
99 
100 void
101 LawNNInferenceTesterService::
102 init()
103 {
104 
105 }
106 
107 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
108 
109 bool
110 LawNNInferenceTesterService::
111 _unitaryTestNNInference()
112 {
113  Law::ScalarRealProperty in1(0,"I1");
114  Law::ScalarRealProperty in2(1,"I2");
115  Law::ScalarRealProperty in3(2,"I3");
116  Law::ScalarRealProperty out1(4,"O1");
117  Law::ScalarRealProperty out2(5,"O2");
118 
119  Law::VariableManager vars(mesh());
120 
121  // add properties to variables manager
122  vars << Law::variable<Arcane::Cell>(in1);
123  vars << Law::variable<Arcane::Cell>(in2);
124  vars << Law::variable<Arcane::Cell>(in3);
125  vars << Law::variable<Arcane::Cell>(out1);
126  vars << Law::variable<Arcane::Cell>(out2);
127 
128  auto accessor = vars.variables<Arcane::Cell>();
129 
130  // initialize input properties with random values
131  auto vin1 = accessor.values(in1);
132  auto vin2 = accessor.values(in2);
133  auto vin3 = accessor.values(in3);
134 
135  Arcane::random::MinstdRand generator;
136  Arcane::random::Uniform01<Arcane::random::MinstdRand> uniform(generator);
137  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell, allCells())
138  {
139  vin1[icell] = uniform();
140  vin2[icell] = uniform();
141  vin3[icell] = uniform();
142  }
143 
144  // neural neuron network inference law evaluation using onnx
145  // available because config.xml used language="law[inference=onnx]"
146  Law::FunctionManager funcs;
147  if(options()->withMultiScalar)
148  {
149  NNInferenceMultiScalar::Signature s;
150  s.input.add(in1);
151  s.input.add(in2);
152  s.input.add(in3);
153  s.output.add(out1);
154  s.output.add(out2);
155  // passing onnx file instead of evaluation function
156  std::string onnx_file_name("./test_model_3_2_2.onnx");
157  auto f = std::make_shared<NNInferenceMultiScalar::Function>(s, onnx_file_name);
158  funcs << f;
159  }
160  else
161  {
162  NNInferenceScalar::Signature s;
163  s.input_1_1 = in1;
164  s.input_1_2 = in2;
165  s.input_1_3 = in3;
166  s.output_1_1 = out1;
167  s.output_1_2 = out2;
168  // passing onnx file instead of evaluation function
169  std::string onnx_file_name("./test_model_3_2_2.onnx");
170  auto f = std::make_shared<NNInferenceScalar::Function>(s, onnx_file_name);
171  funcs << f;
172  }
173  // create evaluator
174  Law::FunctionEvaluator e(funcs);
175  // evaluate laws
176  e.evaluate(accessor, allCells());
177 
178  // get law output properties
179  auto vout1 = accessor.values(out1);
180  auto vout2 = accessor.values(out2);
181 
182  // check results
183  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell, allCells()) {
184  // compute reference values
185  float result_1, result_2;
186  _compute_onnx_expected_results(
187  vin1[icell],vin2[icell],vin3[icell],
188  result_1,result_2);
189  // check results with reference values
190  const float eps = std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon();
191  if(std::fabs(result_1 - vout1[icell]) > eps) return true;
192  if(std::fabs(result_2 - vout2[icell]) > eps) return true;
193  }
194  return false;
195 }
196 
197 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
198 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
199 
200 using namespace Arcane;
201 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_LAWNNINFERENCETESTER(LawNNInferenceTester,LawNNInferenceTesterService);

Interface permettant de definir les services uniques d'une application.
